Welcome to the platform, ladies and gentlemen. The very first thing that we're going to speak about and one of the very first things that you need to focus on is understanding how to have, maintain and stay aligned with a powerful mindset that operates from truth that consistently positions you for personal success, business success, relationship success, just overall success and positivity while staying in a state where you're grateful for everything that's going on. Mindset is the most powerful asset that you have in life, period. It is up to you solely to hold yourself accountable, to stay aligned with some of the things that I'm going to talk to you guys about relating to mindset. The things in which we are going to speak about, I may write down, but you also need to be sitting here. You need to be taking notes. You guys need to get out some kind of piece of paper, a pad, a note app on your phone, something where you're actually typing or writing what it is that I'm about to talk to you about because you need to hear it. You need to see it. You need to take action on it right away. Whatever sticks out to you, make sure you apply. More importantly, if you don't understand anything, reach out. Mindset, what is it that you can do right now that's going to position you to evolve? In my opinion, it's the things that you tell yourself and it's the things that you postulate. There's these things in life where you tell yourself something happens and then you take an action because you said that a result occurred to you or a consequence happened or something in your life occurred because of a thing. Your actions are then dictated because of that thing. If you go around life and you understand and reverse engineer all of these little roadblocks or flows that you've created for yourself, you position yourself to understand that as you go through life, you can literally say things like, this just happened because of that. Now, I'm going to do this because that occurred. Now, if you understood what I just said and I'm going to break it down one more time for you, you say to yourself, if this occurred, a result, you derived a consequence positive or negative, if something happened to you, you then draw a conclusion. This is how your brain works. You then draw a conclusion from that result and you say to yourself, well, because I acted this way to get that result, I have to either do that again or I have to avoid that thing. This gives you the ability to actually create habit loops for yourself. I thought about every single thing that I could tell you about mindset. I thought about everything that I could break down for you. I thought about telling you about books. I thought about telling you about all the teachers that I've had to learn from in life, all the mentors I've had to talk about, all the little things that you tell yourself. One of the most powerful lessons that I thought I could teach you is that your entire life, literally every single thing that has ever happened to you, period, is a result of what has either previously happened to you or what you have accepted happening to others to then dictate future behavior for yourself. It's one of the most powerful things that you can comprehend about self to become self aware. Now the second thing that I want to talk to you about is talking to yourself. A lot of people are positioned nowadays where they're either under the opinion of others, so they don't do a lot of what they want to do because they're under the scrutiny of what other people think about them. We'll talk about that more in another little course inside of this program. But right now I want to talk to you about talking to yourself. Now I don't mean you're crazy and you're sitting there in your home having a full-on conversation. Some people choose to do that, but that's the outlet that you want to ride. Feel free to do that. But in my opinion, talking to yourself means there's kind of that little voice in your head. Sometimes you'll hear it when you're very quiet. Most of the time it's logic or it's something that just is the most appropriate decision. Sometimes it's intuition. Sometimes it's considered your sixth sense. Whatever it is that's like that true little voice in your head, allow that to kind of talk to you. I want you to kind of look at yourself like you're in a third person position. I want you to kind of look at yourself like you're kind of operating in your body and everything that you're seeing here is like how you operate, live, and breathe in your mindset. But I want you to perceive yourself mentally like that little voice in your head is the true you and that you operate from that voice. Because if you're acknowledging what I'm saying right now, you're acknowledging the fact that you have that general day to day just thinking voice inside of your head. But occasionally you have that small voice that comes about and that's actually where and why you have conversations with yourself sometimes and why you can talk out loud. Why do you talk from two perspectives? But if you stop talking from the one that just thinks consistently and you start narrowing it down to just that true voice, it's going to allow you to position yourself for success to go through your day to day to position yourself for more of a true state from operating from something that aligns you to your higher self, something that aligns you to the greater good and to universal truth and universal law. Because an object in motion that gains mass or energy or inertia while asymmetrical will destroy itself. So that being said, this is just a light video on mindset. I really want you guys to understand once again that every single thing happens in your life because a result or consequence, something occurred, you got something and you said that it happened for a particular reason and that dictates your behavior or you watched something happen to somebody else and that then dictates your behavior because you've accepted the result of them into your own and I want you to be able to talk from your higher voice throughout your day to day from your mental perspective of just how you walk around out of anything and everything that you could do for yourself no matter if you're at the bottom of the totem pole financially or if you're at the tippy top in your billionaire and anywhere in between. If you do these two things of reverse engineering every single thing that's happened to you because you've now realized that everything every single result you've ever gotten dictates your future behavior or that past behavior you're able to make a lot more sense of everything that's happened to you. You're able to pull lessons from everything that's happened to you and if you're talking and thinking from your higher self and not just that general day to day voice you're going to position yourself to see the truth and everything that happens or that's going to happen and you're going to live a much more aligned positive successful life you're going to be able to profit and prosper. I'll see you guys in the next course.
